vulnerabilities.title: LayerZero Communication Lag
vulnerabilities.description: Cross-chain message delays during periods of extreme Base network congestion can lead to temporary liquidity fragmentation where funds are locked on the source chain longer than the protocol timeout.
vulnerabilities.impact: HIGH - Temporary denial of service and user fund locking.
vulnerabilities.likelihood: MEDIUM - Dependent on network congestion and LayerZero relay availability.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Implement a retry mechanism with dynamic timeouts and a manual override for institutional relayers.
